1: This ability raises your base Strength by 2 points for each ability level.
10: This ability raises your base Save Vs Magic by 2 points for each ability level.
100: This ability reduces your reuse time on feign death by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
101: This ability gives you the chance to automatically perform a bonus flying kick on ripostes 25, 35, and 50 percent of the time.
102: This ability will cause all NPCs to forget about you.  If you are out of immediate combat, this ability will also make you invisible similar to your hiding ability.
103: This ability reduces your chance of failing on a poison combination by 10, 25, and 50 percent. It also reduces the time to apply poison by 2.5 seconds per ability level. Once one point is applied to this ability, you will never again fail in poison application.
104: This ability will give you an increased chance to execute a double riposte 15, 35, and 50 percent of the time.
107: This ability will remove all poisons from your body.
108: This ability will allow you to perform up to 2 additional attacks from your primary hand.
109: This ability will allow you to strike everything in a small radius.
11: This ability raises your base Save Vs Poison by 2 points for each ability level.
110: This ability will allow you to taunt everything in a small radius.
111: This ability will allow you to make your entire group immune to fear for 10 seconds per level of the ability.
112: This ability will give you increased healing ability per bandage by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
113: This ability increases the duration of beneficial buffs that you cast by an additional 20 percent.
114: This ability gives you an increased chance to score a critical hit with your direct damage spells.
115: This ability will increased your song ranges by 10, 15, and 25 percent.
116: This ability augments Dragon Punch for human monks and Tail Rake for iksars with the chance to automatically perform a Knockback.
117: This ability will grant you the ability to cast an extremely low resistance Root-type spell.
118: This ability allows for specialization and improved use of your voice.
119: This ability will give you one additional point of mana and hit point regeneration.
12: This ability raises your base Save Vs Disease by 2 points for each ability level.
120: This ability will give you additional improvements in your Natural Durability, Avoidance Boost, and Mitigation Boost.
121: This ability will reduce the reuse time on your sense and disarm trap skills.
122: This ability will reduce the damage that you take from falling.
123: This ability will reduce the amount of time that it takes you to memorize a song.
124: This ability will allow you to do minimal backstab damage on your backstab attempt, even if you are not positioned behind the monster.
125: This ability will allow you to give your pet a 'hold' command until explicitly told to attack. Usage: /pet hold.
126: Once you train this ability, you may imbue your pet with an attack that is reputed to slow an enemy's walking.
127: This ability gives Beastlords the power to send themselves into an animalistic frenzy, bent only on slaughter, for a brief period of time.
128: This ability allows the Beastlord to share some of his natural attunement with his party in the form of health and mana.
129: This ability raises your innate Strength by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
13: This ability will slightly modify your base run speed. This modification does NOT stack with movement rate spell effects.
130: This ability raises your innate Stamina by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
131: This ability raises your innate Agility by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
132: This ability raises your innate Dexterity by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
133: This ability raises your innate Intelligence by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
134: This ability raises your innate Wisdom by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
135: This ability raises your innate Charisma by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
136: This ability raises your base resistance to fire-based spells by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
137: This ability raises your base resistance to cold-based spells by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
138: This ability raises your base resistance to magic-based spells by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
139: This ability raises your base resistance to poison-based spells by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
14: This ability raises your regeneration ability by 1 point per ability level.
140: This ability raises your base resistance to disease-based spells by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
141: Training with the sages and merchants of New Tanaan gives adventurers the chance to hone their crafting skills.  For each rank of this ability that you purchase, you are able to raise an additional trade skill past its Specialization level (200).  (This ability applies to Baking, Blacksmithing, Brewing, Fletching, Jewelcraft, Pottery, and Tailoring.)
142: This ability raises the maximum that your statistics can be raised to, with items or spells, by 5 points per rank.  You may train in this ability once each level, beginning at level 61.
143: This ability raises your innate Strength by two points per rank.  You may train in this ability twice each level, beginning at level 61.
144: Those who have meditated on the plains of Tranquility find themselves able to expand their capacity of both Insight and Intellect.  Each rank of this ability raises the maximum that you may raise your Intelligence and Wisdom by ten points.  You may train in this ability once each level, beginning at level 61.
146: This ability increases the maximum effectiveness of your healing spells by three percent per rank.  You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching levels 62, 63, and 64.
147: This ability increases your chance to score an exceptional heal by two percent per rank. An exceptional heal doubles the healing value of the spell.  You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching levels 62, 63, and 64.
148: This ability gives you a chance to immediately slay an NPC that is below ten percent health and fleeing with a single, well placed strike. The first level works on NPC's below level 55, the second on NPC's below 57, and the third on NPC's below 59.   You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching levels 62, 63, and 64.
149: This ability further increases your chance to score a critical blow against your opponent.  You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching levels 62, 63, and 64.
15: This ability decreases your food consumption by 10, 25 and 50 percent.
150: This ability makes it impossible for you to fizzle a spell. The first level affects all spells below level 54.  The second, on all spells below level 56.  The third, on all spells below level 58.  You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching levels 62, 63, and 64.
151: This ability further increases your chance of completely avoiding incoming melee damage. You may train in this ability once each level after reaching level 61.
152: This ability further increases your mitigation of incoming melee damage. You may train in this ability once each level after reaching level 61.
153: This ability grants its wielder the ability to cure their party of many afflictions, poisons, curses, and harmful magics.  You may train in the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
154: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Bestow Divine Aura by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
155: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Turn Undead by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
156: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Purify Soul by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
157: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Gather Mana by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
158: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Rabid Bear by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
159: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Exodus by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
16: This ability increases the amount of air you have by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
160: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Strong Root by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
161: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Mend Companion by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
162: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Turn Summoned by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
163: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Area Taunt by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
164: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Rampage by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
165: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Purify Body by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
166: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Escape by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
167: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Purge Poison by ten percent per rank. You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching level 63.
168: This ability further increases your chance of doubly riposting your opponent each time you score a successful riposte by ten percent per rank.  You may train in this ability once each level, upon reaching levels 62, 63, and 64.
169: Using this ability balances the health of your group such that all group members end up with the same amount of damage taken.  The first rank does so at a 20 percent penalty to the average, the second rank does to at a 10 percent penalty, and the final rank does so at no penalty.   You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
17: This ability increases the maximum that you can bind wound by 10 percent for each ability level.
170: Developed by the denizens of Tranquility as a deterrent to potential attackers, this ability will shield you with a single-hit, large damage barrier of thorns.  Additional ranks of this ability increase the amount of damage that is inflicted.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
171: This ability causes your target to succumb to a sudden, violent attack, after which they are frequently unable to move for a time.  Each rank of this ability increases the amount of time that the victim remains immobile.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
172: This ability gathers streams of additional mana into your being.  You may train this ability at or after level 62.
173: This ability provides Enchanters with an additional line of defense in the form of an added self-only rune.  Each rank of this ability provides a stronger rune than the previous.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
174: This ability calls a loyal servant into being who will repeatedly hurl fire at your target.  Each rank of this ability increases the amount of time that the servant is able to remain by your side (45, 70, and 90 seconds).  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
175: This ability calls the shade of a nearby corpse back to life to serve the Necromancer.  The soulless abomination will fight the target, until called back to the afterlife some time later.  The slave summoned by the first rank of this ability serves for 60 seconds, and each increasing rank adds 15 additional seconds.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
176: This ability grants the summoner the ability to suspend and recall their existing pet at will, provided they remain in their current zone.  The first rank suspends the pet at its current health only, while the second rank suspends the pet with all of its beneficial effects as well as its weapons and armor.  You may cast a second pet while your first pet is Suspended.  You may train the first rank upon reaching level 62 and the second rank upon reaching level 64.
177: This ability calls a number of spirit companions into existence directed at a target.  The companions attack the target without question until they are called back to their home plane 60 seconds later.  The initial rank of this ability calls three companions.  Additional ranks add one companion each.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
178: This ability grants improvements to your existing Celestial Regeneration.  You may train in the two ranks of this ability at or after levels 63 and 64.
179: This ability will cause your existing Improved Familiar to summon an even more powerful companion.  This familiar provides even greater benefits to its owner than its predecessor.  (Use your existing Improved Familiar hotkey to activate it.)
18: This ability increases the maximum effectiveness of your healing spells by 2, 5, and 10 percent.
180: This ability invokes the direct blessing of your deity upon all of those nearby.  All in range are healed 750 hit points in the first rank, and successive ranks each add 250.  You may train in this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
181: This ability further increases the amount of healing provided by a single bandage while binding wounds.  The two ranks of this ability may be trained at or after levels 63 and 64.
182: This ability further increases the chance of performing a superior mend.  The three ranks of this ability may be trained once each level for levels 63 and above.
183: This ability further increases the chance of performing a flurry attack upon successfully scoring a triple attack.  The three ranks of this ability may be trained once each level for levels 63 and above.
184: This ability transforms you into an exceptionally bloodthirsty wolf that attacks with lightning speed, for a brief time.  You may train the three ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
185: For a brief time, you are able to commune with the woodland spirits who provide you r party with exceptional regenerative abilities and a protective shield of armor and thorns.  You may train in the three ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
186: This ability grants you a chance of performing a double attack in any given combat round.  You may train in this ability once each level after reaching level 61.
187: This ability grants you a chance of performing a double attack in any given combat round.  You may train in this ability once each level after reaching level 61.
188: This ability grants you an increased chance of performing a double attack with two-handed weapons in any given combat round.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
189: This ability grants you an increased chance of performing a double attack in any given combat round.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
19: This ability grants you a chance to score an exceptional heal at  3, 6, and 10 percent. An exceptional heal doubles the healing value of the spell.
190: Root spells applied by the owner of this ability are significantly less likely to break when the victim takes damage initiated by anyone, unlike previous abilities which only affect damage caused by the caster.
191: This ability provides an even greater extension to the range of group songs.  The three ranks of this ability may be trained once each level for levels 63 and above.
192: This ability allows for further improvements in the use of all instrument and singing types. The three ranks of this ability may be trained once each level for levels 63 and above.
193: This ability allows you to instruct your pet to feign death via the '/pet feign' command.  Three ranks of this skill are available, causing your pet to succeed 25%, 50%, and 75% of the time, respectively.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
194: The most devout find that their calls are answered with much greater frequency. This ability grants your Death Pact-type spells a second chance to successfully heal their target.  Additional ranks of this ability cause said spells to do a portion of their healing value even on a complete failure.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
195: Progressive ranks of this ability grant you finer control over your animations. At its initial level, you are allowed to give your animations "guard" and "follow" commands.  At the second rank, "attack" commands.  At the final rank, "back off" commands.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
196: Training in this ability shortens the time between uses of Divine Stun by seven seconds per rank.  The three ranks of this ability may be trained once each level for levels 63 and above.
197: This extends the your capacity to act as a living shield,   This ability adds twelve seconds per rank to the duration of your /SHIELD.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
198: The most advanced Shadow Knights can further enhance their Leech Curse ability.  This ability adds 200 additional damage and healing to Leech Curse, per rank.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
199: This ability allows you to bellow with a force that causes physical harm to your enemies as well as potentially interfering with their spell casting.
2: This ability raises your base Stamina by 2 points for each ability level.
20: This ability gives you an increased chance of making your specialization checks.  It also reduces your chance to fizzle and increases the chance to lower the mana cost for the spell by 5, 15, and 30 percent.
200: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Lay Hands by twelve minutes per rank. You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
201: This ability decreases the amount of time required between uses of Harm Touch and its upgrades by twelve minutes per rank. You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
202: This ability increases the chance of scoring an extra hit with all two-handed weapons that you wield.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
203: This ability grants you the chance to score an additional attack with two-handed weapons.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
204: This ability provides a previously unheard of level of stealth.  The Rogue is able to draw shadows about himself so completely, even creatures that are normally not fooled by such trickery are frequently unable to see him. You may train in this ability upon reaching level 63.
205: This ability grants you a chance to hide or evade while moving.  Each rank provides an increasing chance. You may train in this ability once each level after reaching level 61.
206: Under the tutelage of Wu, Monks are able to hone their skills to the point of being able to execute a second and sometimes even third strike when scoring a hit with their special attacks.  This ability grants a ten percent increase in the chance of scoring multiple special attacks, per rank.
207: This ability calls an assault of elemental minions into existence directed at a target.  The minions attack the target without question until they are called back to their plane 60 seconds later.  The initial rank of this ability calls five elementals.  Additional ranks add two elementals each.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 63, 64, and 65.
208: This ability calls a number of swords of Xuzl into existence directed at a target.  The swords attack the target until they dissipate 45 seconds later.  The initial rank of this ability calls two swords.  Additional ranks add one sword each.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
209: This ability reduces the time between which you may attempt to hide or evade by one second per rank.  You may train the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 62, and 63.
21: This ability increases the duration of beneficial spells that you cast by 5, 15, and 30 percent.
210: You must have both the Horse Models and your current Luclin Character Model enabled to ride a horse.
211: This ability allows Bards and their groups the potential to run at previously unheard of speeds.  You may train in this ability at or after levels 62 and 64.
212: This ability will cause all NPCs to forget about you.  If you are out of immediate combat, this ability will also make you invisible.  This ability is usable any time that you have 900 mana.
213: Studying ones opponent for weaknesses provides the Warrior with the ability to pierce through advanced defenses.  Each rank of this ability grants an increasing chance of bypassing an opponents special defenses, such as dodge, block, parry, and riposte.  You may train in this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
214: This ability grants a chance that the healing effect on your lifetaps will provide an exceptional amount of healing.
215: This ability further increases your chance to score a critical hit with your direct damage spells.
216: This ability further increases your chance to score a critical hit with your direct damage spells.
217: This ability allows you to project your innate talent with illusions upon others.  (Activating this ability on a targeted group member causes your next illusion spell to affect that target.)
218: This ability provides you the chance of instantly killing an opponent who is too far below you in level to provide a challenge, when using a bow.
219: This ability provides you an additional means of entrapping, or more specifically, ensnaring an opponent.
22: This ability increases your natural mana regeneration by 1 point per ability level.
220: A further enhancement to Improved Harm Touch, this ability grants a considerable bonus to the amount of damage done by that ability.  You gain the ability to train an additional rank at levels 61, 63, and 65.
221: This ability adds strength to your charm spells.  Victims of your charm spells are less likely to break out of their charms early.
222: This ability grants a chance to endure what would otherwise be a stunning blow, from any angle, without being stunned.  You may train in the ranks of this ability at or after levels 61, 63, and 65.
223: This ability reduces the casting time of your summoning spells by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
224: This ability increases your natural mana regeneration by 1 point per ability level.
225: This ability raises your regeneration ability by 1 point per ability level.
226: This ability allows you to do non-resistable damage in an amount based off of your current mana.
23: This ability gives you a chance to land critical hits with your direct damage spells.  The ability levels increase your chance to score a critical by 2, 4, and 7 percent.
24: This ability reduces the chance of your spell casts being interrupted.  The ability levels reduce your interrupts by 5, 10, and 15 percent.
25: After training in this ability, NPCs will notice your magical activities 5, 10, and 20 percent less.
26: This ability makes it impossible for you to fizzle a spell. The first level affects all spells below level 20.  The second, on all spells below level 35.  The third, on all spells below level 52.
27: This ability reduces the casting time of beneficial spells with a cast time greater  than four seconds.  The ability levels reduce these casting times by 5, 15, and 25 percent.
28: This ability increases your maximum hitpoints by 2, 5, and 10 percent.  (The percentages are based off of your base hitpoints, which include stamina and stamina effects.)
29: This ability raises your natural regeneration by one point per ability level.
3: This ability raises your base Agility by 2 points for each ability level.
30: This ability increases your chance to land a critical hit.  Non-Warriors will nearly match the original critical hit abilites of Warriors, while Warriors will remain significantly ahead of other classes.
31: This ability grants you a resistance bonus to fear type spells of 5, 10, and 25 percent. It also increases the chance of breaking fear earlier.
32: This ability gives you a chance to finish off an NPC that is below 10 percent health and fleeing with a single blow. The first level works on NPC's below 50, the second on NPC's below 52, and the third on NPC's below 54. (Non-Warriors must first train one level of Combat Fury to use this ability.)
33: This ability increases melee damage mitigation by 2, 5, and 10 percent.
34: This ability increases your melee damage avoidance by 2, 5 and 10 percent.
35: This ability turns the next group buff that you cast into a beneficial area effect spell, hitting everyone within its radius, at the cost of doubling the spell's mana usage.
36: This ability allows you to provide a resurrection that restores 100 percent experience, all hit points and mana, and causes no adverse resurrection effects.
37: This ability allows you to become invisible to the undead, nearly at will, without the need to memorize a spell.
38: This ability gives you the ability to cast a large heal over time spell at no mana cost.
39: This ability gives you the ability to cast a Divine Aura spell on a Player target, temporarily rendering the target invulnerable.
4: This ability raises your base Dexterity by 2 points for each ability level.
40: This ability grants you an AE Fear DoT spell useful against undead.  Each ability level amplifies the damage.
41: This ability allows you to cast a spell that cures all ailments except for charm, fear, and resurrection effects.
42: This ability reduces the casting time on your evacuation and succor spells by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
43: This ability gives you the ability to cast an extremely fast-casting, no mana cost evacuation or succor spell.
44: This ability reduces the casting time on your damage spells that have a casting time greater than four seconds by 2, 5 and 10 percent.
45: This ability reduces the chance that a rooted NPC will be freed by your damage spells by 50 percent.
46: This ability gives you the chance to permanently charm an NPC.  (Enchanters: All.  Druids: Animals only.  Necromancers: Undead only.)
47: This ability will give the caster a new, massive Cannibalize spell.
48: This ability reduces the casting time of many beneficial spells that have a duration by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
49: This ability reduces your chances of failing alchemy combinations by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
5: This ability raises your base Intelligence by 2 points for each ability level.
50: This ability turns you into a Rabid Bear, boosting all of your offensive capabilities.
52: This ability will summon an improved familiar that is an upgrade from the greater familiar. This improved familiar is higher in level, has more hitpoints, and is very resistant to all spells.
53: This ability gives you an instant-cast self gate spell to the Nexus.
55: This ability allows you to zone without losing your current illusion.
56: This ability reduces your chance of failing jewelcraft combinations by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
57: This ability allows you to recover all of your mana.
58: This ability allows you to cast a Lay of Hands type spell on your pet.
6: This ability raises your base Wisdom by 2 points for each ability level.
60: This ability allows you to cast a buff on your pet that will cause it to go berserk, doing increased damage.
61: This ability will allow you to turn into a fire elemental, gaining many of the innate benefits of the form, as well as some of the penalties.
62: This ability will allow you to turn into a water elemental, gaining many of the innate benefits of the form, as well as some of the penalties.
63: This ability will allow you to turn into an earth elemental, gaining many of the innate benefits of the form, as well as some of the penalties.
64: This ability will allow you to turn into an air elemental, gaining many of the innate benefits of the form, as well as some of the penalties.
65: This ability will increase the amount of mana returned to you when reclaiming your pet.
66: This ability grants you an AE Fear DoT spell useful against summoned creatures.
67: This ability will prevent components used in the summoning of pets from being expended.
68: This ability allows you to cast a no-resist direct damage spell equal to that of your current hitpoints. The effect drains your life and provides a life bond effect thatdoes 250 damage per tick, for 6 ticks.
69: This ability allows you to cast an AE low resist mesmerization spell effective against the undead.
7: This ability raises your base Charisma by 2 points for each ability level.
70: Allows you to cast an AE low resist fear spell.
71: This ability allows you to turn any meat or body part item into bone chips.  You must hold the item or stack on your cursor. *Warning* This ability will use magicial or no drop items if they are held on the cursor.
72: This ability allows you to cast a no component summon corpse spell.
73: Training in this ability gives you a new, fast-casting spell that has the chance to interrupt Level 60 or lower NPCs.  Normal resist rules apply.
74: This ability will turn your Lay of Hands into a complete heal.
75: This ability will cause your criticals to inflict greatly improved damage versus the undead.
76: This noble ability will allow you to transfer all of your hit points to a target player, killing you in the process.
77: This ability provides you with the power to call the ultimate holy steed to your side.
78: This ability will make you permanently immune to fear spells.
79: This ability will allow you to use your Bash skill while wielding any 2-handed weapon.
8: This ability raises your base Save Vs Fire by 2 points for each ability level.
80: This ability allows you to become invisible, nearly at will, without the need to memorize a spell.
81: This ability increases your chance to use dual wield successfully.
82: This ability increases your archery damage 30, 60, and 100 percent.
83: This ability reduces your chance of failing on fletching combinations by 10, 25, and 50 percent.
84: This ability provides you a never-ending supply of arrows.
85: This ability provides you with the power to call the ultimate unholy steed to your side.
86: This ability gives you a low-resist Harm Touch.  Using this ability also uses your existing Harm Touch timer.
87: This ability gives you a life tap harm touch.  Using this ability also uses your existing Harm Touch timer.
89: This ability gives you increased damage off of the lifetap procs that result from your self buffs.
9: This ability raises your base Save Vs Cold by 2 points for each ability level.
90: This ability allows for improved use of all instrument types.
94: This ability allows you to sing your songs at a higher apparent level.  Note: This does not allow you to sing songs that are actually higher than your level.
97: This ability gives you a chance to perform a superior mend 5, 10, and 25 percent of the time.
98: This ability removes all negative affects from your body except for fear, charm, and resurrection affects.
